MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-26-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances via Zoom Conference
Daniel Gopstein, Esq., of QUILL & ARROW, LLP. Tel: 310.933.4271 for plaintiff.
Olivia J. Miner, Esq., of WILSON TURNER KOSMO LL Tel: 619.236.9600 for defendant.

Hearing is held. Counsel for Defendant contests the tentative ruling regarding the deadline for submitting documents and requests an extension of 30 days to produce all responsive documents, subject to a protective order for confidential materials. The matter was argued and discussed. Upon conclusion of the hearing, the Court adopts the tentative ruling with modifications.

Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to requests 8, 16, and 23-31 of her first set of document requests and for monetary sanctions is granted in part.

Defendant must provide further verified code-compliant objections without objections to requests 8, 16 and 30 and produce all responsive documents subject to a protective order for confidential documents no later than July 15, 2025.

*** Defendant must produce all responsive documents subject to a protective
order for confidential documents no later than August 14, 2025.***

Monetary sanctions requested by both plaintiff and defendant are denied.

Requests 8, 16 and 30. Defendant's objections lack merit and are stricken. Defendant must produce all responsive documents.

Request 23-29 and 31. Defendant's responses are sufficient and no further responses are required.

Because both sides acted with substantial justification, no monetary sanctions are awarded.

Order is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
